description_long: This is a modern two-story bungalow with a flat, dark roof and a prominent front porch supported by white columns. The facade features symmetrical window arrangements and a balcony on the upper floor, providing a sense of openness and light. The property includes a paved driveway with two parking spaces, landscaped with palm trees and surrounded by additional greenery. On one side, there is a backyard area with a swimming pool, sun loungers, and a patio umbrella, suggesting recreational use. A car is parked in the driveway, and the lot is bordered by several trees, enhancing the suburban feel. The overall design is clean and geometric, with a focus on outdoor living and contemporary aesthetics.
description: A modern two-story bungalow with a flat roof, front porch, balcony, driveway, and a backyard pool, surrounded by landscaped greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, porch, driveway with two parking spaces, and palm trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, parked car, and the symmetrical arrangement of windows and columns.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a swimming pool, sun loungers, patio umbrella, and additional trees.
description_view_3: Back corner view emphasizing the pool area, patio umbrella, and the geometric layout of the property.
